body.thing: uu <verb> imports unseen_university in a bare shell (no activated venv)
body.intention: A zero-inference uu view resolves an interpreter that can import unseen_university without an already-activated venv on PATH, so it never dies with ModuleNotFoundError in a plain terminal

red_run.summary:
f"uu opentickets failed to import unseen_university in a bare shell:\n{r.stderr}"

body.why: CP6: a view must run in a bare shell and fail soft; the launcher must not depend on venv activation
